title: hieracium dovrense subsp. cartilagineum
intro: Hieracium dovrense subsp. cartilagineum, also known as the cartilaginous hawk's beard, is a rare and perennial herbaceous plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium dovrense subsp. cartilagineum include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a tincture or infused in teas and infusions, although its availability and usage may be limited due to its rarity.
